message: Raised parked configuration used as the task sequence start.
Camera-friendly observation posture visibly offset from safe home.
Staging posture with a clear lateral move before the peg grasp approach.
Conservative joint-space approach toward the grasp region.
Lifted clearance posture after the grasp approach.
Staging posture before the insertion approach.
Slow approach posture toward the insertion fixture.
Short hold at the insertion approach for logging and contact instrumentation.
Retreat posture that clears the fixture region.
Return to the raised parked home configuration.
